across.clue: Allow someone time to act | Give/take sb a ___ to do
To celebrate is to do something to show that an event is special.
Breadth is the distance from one side to the other side of something.
If something is cozy, then it is comfortable, warm, and relaxing.
Something fashionable is what people like to wear and do now.
Absence is the state of something being away.
to decide to start using a particular idea plan or method
Friendship is the relationship between people who are friends.
When a liquid is condensed, it is made thicker.
a period of 100 years usually counted from a year ending in -00.

down.clue: Christ is the title given to Jesus, considered by Christians to be the savior.
When something is blank, it does not have anything on it.
An agent is a person who works for a company or another person.
To frustrate means to cause feelings of disappointment or annoyance.
To beware means to be careful of something or someone that is dangerous.
When someone is disobedient, they do not follow the rules or instructions.
To operate means to work or function.
a situation in which separate things happen by chance at the same time or in the same way.
A navy is the part of a country’s military that fights at sea.
